storage_calculator_items.name: Bed - Queen
storage_calculator_items.description: Queen mattress plus box spring and frame.

storage_calculator_items.name: Bed - King
storage_calculator_items.description: King mattress, box spring, and frame.

storage_calculator_items.name: Dresser - Large
storage_calculator_items.description: Tall or wide dresser with drawers.

storage_calculator_items.name: Small Box
storage_calculator_items.description: Small box for books or heavy items.

storage_calculator_items.name: Medium Box
storage_calculator_items.description: Medium moving box for kitchenware, decor, and misc items.

storage_calculator_items.name: Large Box
storage_calculator_items.description: Large box for bedding, pillows, and bulky but light items.

storage_calculator_items.name: Flat-Screen TV (40"–55")
storage_calculator_items.description: Flat-screen TV packed upright in a TV box.

storage_unit_sizes.name: 5' x 5'
storage_unit_sizes.short_description: Fits several medium boxes, small furniture, or seasonal items. Similar to a small walk-in closet.

storage_unit_sizes.name: 5' x 10'
storage_unit_sizes.short_description: Ideal for a studio or small 1-bedroom worth of furniture, including a sofa, mattress set, and 10–15 boxes.

storage_unit_sizes.name: 8' x 12' Mobile Pod
storage_unit_sizes.short_description: Mobile storage pod delivered to your door. Suited for most 1–2 bedroom apartments.

storage_unit_sizes.name: 10' x 10'
storage_unit_sizes.short_description: Common choice for a 1–2 bedroom apartment or small home, plus boxes and small appliances.

storage_unit_sizes.name: 10' x 15'
storage_unit_sizes.short_description: Fits contents of a 2–3 bedroom home including larger furniture and appliances.

storage_unit_sizes.name: 10' x 20'
storage_unit_sizes.short_description: Garage-sized space for a 3–4 bedroom home or vehicle plus boxes.

supply_categories.name: All Packing Supplies
supply_categories.description: Browse all boxes, tape, padding, and packing accessories in one place.

supply_categories.name: Boxes & Kits
supply_categories.description: Moving boxes, room kits, and bundled packing sets.

supply_categories.name: Tape & Protective Wrap
supply_categories.description: Packing tape, stretch wrap, bubble wrap, and furniture covers.

promotions.name: Weekend Move-In Special – 25% Off First Month
promotions.short_description: Get 25% off your first month when you move in on a weekend at our South End Boston location.
promotions.full_description: Book a new storage unit at our South End Boston facility and choose a Saturday or Sunday move-in date to receive 25% off your first month's storage rent. This Weekend Move-In promotion is valid for standard or climate-controlled units and mobile storage pods. Discount applies to rent only (taxes, insurance, and one-time fees excluded) and is available for new customers only.
promotions.restrictions_text: Valid only for new bookings at South End Boston with a Saturday or Sunday move-in date. Discount applies to first month of storage rent only and cannot be combined with other booking discounts.

promotions.name: Spring Pod Delivery – $50 Off
promotions.short_description: $50 off your first month of mobile pod storage in San Francisco and Daly City.
promotions.full_description: Reserve a mobile storage pod for delivery to ZIP codes 94110, 94103, or 94014 and get $50 off your first month of storage. Applies to 5' x 10' pods and 8' x 12' mobile pods when stored at our facility. Delivery and pickup fees are not discounted.
promotions.restrictions_text: Valid for new mobile pod storage bookings only. Discount applies to first month of storage rent for eligible pod sizes. Cannot be combined with other pod-specific offers.

promotions.name: Moving Supplies – 10% Off Orders Over $50
promotions.short_description: Save 10% on eligible packing supplies when your pre-tax subtotal is $50 or more.
promotions.full_description: Stock up on boxes, tape, and protective wrap and get 10% off when your supplies subtotal (before tax and shipping) is $50 or more. Discount automatically applies at checkout when you enter the promo code and meet the minimum spend.
promotions.restrictions_text: Valid on eligible supplies only. Excludes clearance items and services. Minimum supplies subtotal of $50 required after other discounts and before tax.

promotions.name: Online Booking – 10% Off 3+ Month Plans
promotions.short_description: Book online for 3 months or longer and get 10% off monthly rent.
promotions.full_description: Reserve any standard or climate-controlled storage unit for 3 months or longer using our online booking flow and enjoy 10% off the monthly storage rent for the full committed term. Applies to most unit sizes at participating locations.
promotions.restrictions_text: New customers only. Minimum initial term of 3 months required. Discount applies to storage rent only and cannot be combined with other recurring-rent discounts.

size_guide_scenarios.name: Studio Apartment
size_guide_scenarios.description: Typical contents of a studio: small sofa or loveseat, bed, dresser, and several boxes.
size_guide_scenarios.typical_contents: Small sofa or loveseat, full or queen bed, dresser, TV stand, and 10–15 boxes.

size_guide_scenarios.name: 1 Bedroom Apartment
size_guide_scenarios.description: One bedroom plus living room furniture, small dining set, and typical household boxes.
size_guide_scenarios.typical_contents: Queen bed, nightstands, dresser, sofa, coffee table, TV stand, dining table with 4 chairs, and 15–20 boxes.

size_guide_scenarios.name: 2–3 Bedroom Home
size_guide_scenarios.description: Whole-house storage for a small family home, including larger furniture and appliances.
size_guide_scenarios.typical_contents: Multiple bedroom sets, large sectional or multiple sofas, dining set, appliances, outdoor furniture, and 25–40 boxes.

size_guide_scenarios.name: Just a Few Items & Boxes
size_guide_scenarios.description: Ideal if you only need space for boxes and a couple of small furniture pieces.
size_guide_scenarios.typical_contents: 10–15 medium boxes, a small bookcase, and a few misc items like lamps or side tables.

storage_plans.name: 5' x 10' Mobile Pod – 1 Month (Mission District)
storage_plans.description: Single 5' x 10' mobile storage pod delivered within 20 miles of our Mission hub and stored at our secure facility.
storage_plans.fees_description: One-time delivery and pickup fees apply; billed separately at checkout.
storage_plans.restrictions: Service area limits apply; subject to truck access at your address.

storage_plans.name: 5' x 10' Mobile Pod – 1 Month (SoMa)
storage_plans.description: 5' x 10' mobile pod delivered from our SoMa location and stored at our facility for one month.
storage_plans.fees_description: Delivery, pickup, and optional contents protection sold separately.
storage_plans.restrictions: Limited availability on peak weekends; reserve early for April–September.

storage_plans.name: 5' x 10' Mobile Pod – 1 Month (Daly City Hub)
storage_plans.description: 5' x 10' pod delivered from our Daly City hub and stored at our secure lot.
storage_plans.fees_description: Delivery and redelivery fees not included in monthly price.
storage_plans.restrictions: Service limited to select Peninsula ZIP codes; weight limits apply.

storage_plans.name: 8' x 12' Mobile Pod – 2 Month Plan
storage_plans.description: Larger 8' x 12' mobile pod ideal for a 1–2 bedroom move, stored at our Mission facility for 2 months.
storage_plans.fees_description: Initial delivery and final pickup billed separately; facility access included.
inclusions: Facility storage with extended access hours
Option to extend after 2 months at same monthly rate
storage_plans.restrictions: Subject to availability; maximum loaded weight of 5,000 lbs.

storage_plans.name: 10' x 10' Standard Storage – 6 Month Plan
storage_plans.description: Interior 10' x 10' standard unit in our South End Boston facility with a 6-month commitment.
storage_plans.fees_description: One-time admin fee due at move-in; lock sold separately.
storage_plans.restrictions: Climate control not included; upgrade to climate-controlled plan if required.

storage_plans.name: 10' x 10' Climate-Controlled – 6 Month Plan
storage_plans.description: Climate-controlled 10' x 10' unit ideal for furniture, electronics, and temperature-sensitive items.
storage_plans.fees_description: Standard admin fee applies at move-in; climate fee included in monthly rent.
storage_plans.restrictions: Limited availability; not all floors offer climate control.

storage_plans.name: 10' x 10' Standard Storage – 3 Month Plan
storage_plans.description: Short-term 3-month plan for a 10' x 10' standard unit in South End Boston.
storage_plans.fees_description: Admin fee and lock required at move-in; billed once per unit.
inclusions: Option to extend after initial 3-month term
storage_plans.restrictions: Minimum 3-month billing required; early move-out does not reduce the 3-month minimum charge.

storage_plans.name: 5' x 10' Standard Storage – 3 Month Plan
storage_plans.description: Compact 5' x 10' unit for a smaller 1-bedroom apartment or overflow storage.
storage_plans.fees_description: Standard admin fee at move-in; no climate control surcharge.
storage_plans.restrictions: Ideal for a 1-bedroom with minimal large furniture; verify fit with our size guide.

storage_plans.name: 5' x 10' Standard Storage – Month-to-Month
storage_plans.description: Flexible month-to-month 5' x 10' standard storage unit in South End Boston.
storage_plans.fees_description: Admin fee at move-in; monthly billing until you give 10 days' move-out notice.
storage_plans.restrictions: Rate subject to change with 30 days' notice after initial move-in period.

storage_plans.name: 10' x 10' Standard Storage – Month-to-Month
storage_plans.description: Popular 10' x 10' standard unit at our Midtown Atlanta location with flexible term.
storage_plans.fees_description: One-time admin fee plus optional insurance coverage.
storage_plans.restrictions: Vehicle storage not permitted in this unit size; see 10' x 20' options instead.

storage_plans.name: 5' x 5' Standard Storage – Month-to-Month
storage_plans.description: Closet-sized 5' x 5' unit for boxes and small furniture in Midtown Atlanta.
storage_plans.fees_description: Admin fee due at move-in; lock and insurance available at checkout.
storage_plans.restrictions: Not suitable for large sofas or king-size mattresses; check our size guide for larger units.

storage_plans.name: 10' x 10' Climate-Controlled – Month-to-Month
storage_plans.description: Climate-controlled 10' x 10' unit in Old East Dallas, ideal for long-term storage.
storage_plans.fees_description: Standard admin fee required; temperature control included in rent.
storage_plans.restrictions: Not available for vehicle storage; combustible materials prohibited.

storage_plans.name: 8' x 12' Mobile Pod – 1 Month (Dallas)
storage_plans.description: Large 8' x 12' mobile pod delivered from Old East Dallas and stored at our facility.
storage_plans.fees_description: Delivery and same-day redelivery services priced separately based on ZIP code.
inclusions: Option to schedule same-day access services
storage_plans.restrictions: Service area limited to approximately 20 miles from 75204.

storage_plans.name: 10' x 15' Climate-Controlled – 6 Month Plan
storage_plans.description: Spacious climate-controlled 10' x 15' unit at our South Lake Union Seattle facility.
storage_plans.fees_description: Admin fee and optional insurance due at move-in; climate control included.
storage_plans.restrictions: Limited availability; booking required before move-in.

storage_plans.name: 10' x 10' Standard Storage – 3 Month Plan (Phoenix)
storage_plans.description: Affordable 10' x 10' standard unit in downtown Phoenix with a 3-month minimum.
storage_plans.fees_description: Admin fee due at move-in; no climate control included.
storage_plans.restrictions: Climate-sensitive items should be stored in a climate-controlled unit.

storage_plans.name: 5' x 5' Climate-Controlled – Month-to-Month
storage_plans.description: Small climate-controlled 5' x 5' unit in Denver’s Capitol Hill neighborhood.
storage_plans.fees_description: Admin fee and lock required at move-in.
storage_plans.restrictions: Not intended for vehicle or hazardous materials storage.

supply_products.name: Medium Moving Boxes – 10 Pack
supply_products.description: Bundle of ten medium moving boxes ideal for kitchenware, decor, and misc household items.

supply_products.name: Medium Moving Boxes – 15 Pack
supply_products.description: Value pack of fifteen medium boxes for larger apartment moves.

supply_products.name: Small Moving Boxes – 15 Pack
supply_products.description: Fifteen small boxes ideal for books, tools, and other heavier items.

supply_products.name: Large Moving Boxes – 5 Pack
supply_products.description: Set of five large boxes for bedding, pillows, and bulky but lightweight items.

supply_products.name: Kitchen Moving Kit – 20 Box Bundle
supply_products.description: Complete kitchen moving kit with 20 assorted boxes and divider inserts for dishes and glassware.

supply_products.name: Clear Packing Tape – Single Roll
supply_products.description: One roll of 2" x 55 yd clear packing tape with standard 3" core.

supply_products.name: Clear Packing Tape – 3 Pack
supply_products.description: Three rolls of heavy-duty clear packing tape for sealing multiple boxes.

supply_products.name: Bubble Wrap Roll – 30 ft
supply_products.description: 30-foot roll of small-bubble protective wrap for fragile items.

supply_products.name: Stretch Wrap – 15" x 1000 ft
supply_products.description: Professional-grade stretch wrap for bundling furniture and securing drawers.

supply_products.name: Furniture Pads – 4 Pack
supply_products.description: Four reusable quilted furniture pads to protect large items during moves and storage.

supply_products.name: Mattress Bag – Queen
supply_products.description: Heavy-duty plastic mattress bag to protect a queen-size mattress from dust and moisture.
